'''Zorbia II''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]]. Its terrain consisted of [[Desert/Legends|deserts]], [[Forest/Legends|forests]], and plains. The world was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a group of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] known as the [[Zorbian space pirates]], whose roots seemed to be [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]. The Zorbians were a significant nuisance in the [[Outer Moddell systems]] due to their tendency to attack others in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].

==Description==
Zorbia II, also known simply as Zorbia, was a terrestrial, [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] occupying the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="G9" /> of the [[Outer Moddell systems]]' [[Zorbia system/Legends|Zorbia system]] in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]], one of the [[Sector/Legends|subsectors]] making up the [[Inner Zuma Region]] within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Zuma sector/Legends|Zuma sector]]. It lay on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Ovise Reach/Legends|Ovise Reach]], which connected it to the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor]] and [[Trindello system]]s,<ref name="TEA" /> and it was on the edge of the [[Monsua Nebula/Legends|Monsua Nebula]].<ref name="G9" />

The world had a [[Atmosphere/Legends|Type I breathable atmosphere]] and high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], and its terrain included [[Forest/Legends|forests]], plains, and [[Desert/Legends|deserts]]. Its [[Local day/Legends|local days]] were twenty-eight [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] long, with [[local year]]s lasting 360 days. The world had no major exports or imports.<ref name="G9" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Main|Zorbian space pirates}}
Zorbia was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of a group of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] known as the [[Zorbian space pirates]], thirty million of which lived on the planet and were governed by clans. Although the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates']] [[Language/Legends|language]] appeared to have [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] roots, it was unclear whether Zorbia II was a lost [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] of<ref name="G9" /> the world<ref name="Corellia">{{DB|location|corellia|Corellia}}</ref> [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] or the descendants of castaways. The disorganized Zorbians had been bothersome in the Outer Moddell [[Star system/Legends|systems]] for [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]], even predating the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] survey of the Inner Zuma region.<ref name="G9" />

The pirates of Zorbia were known to attack both each other and [[Starship/Legends|starships]] traveling from the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Trindello/Legends|Trindello]] to the planet of [[Ast Kikorie/Legends|Ast Kikorie]]. Rarely, their raids stretched into [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and the [[Inner Moddell systems]]. The Republic's first interaction with the Zorbians found them using old [[spaceboat]]s and fighting with [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]], an antique [[technology level]] that they would eventually outgrow;<ref name="G9" /> however, they suffered from continued disorganization.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|373|Zorbia II}}</ref> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which include the events of [[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Ewoks'' 2]], to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a group of Zorbians—led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Krag (Zorbian)|Krag]]—traveled to the<ref name="e2">[[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Ewoks'' (1985) 2]]</ref> nearby<ref name="TEA" /> [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]], attacking the native [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]].<ref name="e2" />

==Locations==
Zorbia II was home to two limited [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]].<ref name="G9" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zorbia II was first mentioned in the article "[[Endor and the Moddell Sector]]," which was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey]], [[Daniel Wallace]], and [[Jason Fry]] and published in the [[Star Wars Gamer 9|ninth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine<ref name="G9" /> on [[February 22]], [[2002]].<ref name="GamerDate">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20020222.html|text=Starfighters Soar in Gamer #9}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the worlds of the Zorbia system, and therefore Zorbia II, in grid square H-16.<ref name="TEA" />
